---
title: "Framing the Greek Bailout Referendum: A Crisis-Inducing or a Crisis-Resolving Mechanism?"
author: "Milioni, D. L., Triga, V. and Spyridou, L.-P."
date: 2018-06-01
description: "Participations, 1: 111–140"
categories: [Media and Social Media Monitoring, Public Opinion and Argument Mining]
image: images_publications/placeholder.png
---
